title: Leakage-aware single-cell chemical perturbation benchmark
description: Split manifests, leakage-audit tables, model-result summaries, figure source data, scripts, and manuscript artifacts for a leakage-aware benchmark of single-cell chemical perturbation transcriptomics. Large raw source datasets are not redistributed and should be obtained from their original providers.

creators.name: Lin, Da
creators.affiliation: The Second Affiliated Hospital of Wenzhou Medical University
